name: Dawar Ali
tagline: I keep production boring and pipelines fast.
bio: Senior DevOps Engineer with 6+ years automating, securing, and optimizing mission-critical cloud deployments on AWS — Kubernetes, Terraform, CI/CD, observability, and security-focused DevOps.
about: Senior DevOps Engineer with 6+ years of experience automating, securing, and optimizing mission-critical cloud deployments in AWS. Skilled in Kubernetes, Terraform, Jenkins, GitLab, Docker, CI/CD automation, infrastructure as code, observability, and security-focused DevOps practices. Experienced in IT team leadership, application administration, audit support, DPDP readiness, and integrating AI tools into engineering and administration workflows.

education.school: Islamic University Of Science and Technology

highlights: Cloud platform ownership: drove production AWS + Kubernetes improvements for resilient, secure, scalable microservices workloads
Standardized cloud provisioning with Terraform for repeatability, governance, and control across infrastructure changes
Advanced Jenkins and GitLab CI/CD workflows and introduced AI-assisted review practices to strengthen quality gates
Provided technical leadership across multiple lines of business, aligning platform priorities and stakeholder expectations
Led enterprise administration (Google Workspace, Slack, Jamf, JumpCloud) with AI-enabled tooling for productivity
Partnered with security on vulnerability checks, audit readiness, and DPDP compliance preparation
Tuned Cloudflare WAF and app-layer protections; enhanced observability with Loki for platform health and incident investigation
Managed and maintained AWS infrastructure on Kubernetes for secure, scalable, reliable microservices environments
Designed and maintained robust CI/CD pipelines with Jenkins and GitHub for seamless integration and deployment
Managed IT teams across lines of business to align technology strategy and operational delivery
Administered Google Workspace and Slack for org-wide communication and productivity
Integrated security tooling into development workflows to assess and mitigate vulnerabilities
Supported security audits and DPDP compliance requirements; managed Cloudflare WAF settings
Established incident response protocols and implemented Loki-based monitoring for high availability
Maintained and configured in-house servers including Cloud VPN for reliable operations
Set up LDAP with Google services, integrated with Cloud VPN and Windows/Mac authentication
Optimized infrastructure with HAProxy load balancing, DNS, DHCP, Apache, and Nginx
Migrated the in-house VPN server (with user certificates) to AWS, improving uptime and security
Implemented IP-based access control for MongoDB and MySQL; automated tasks with Bash scripting
Directed and monitored installed systems and infrastructure for maximum availability and performance
Maintained high system uptime through continuous monitoring and maintenance strategies
Administered mobile device management solutions for organizational mobility and security

projects.name: AWS Platform Hardening
projects.description: Hardened AWS accounts and workloads with least-privilege IAM, audit logging, and Cloudflare WAF protections; standardized with Terraform.

projects.name: Kubernetes CI/CD with Jenkins & GitLab
projects.description: Multi-environment pipelines building Docker images with security scanning and progressive deploys to Kubernetes.

projects.name: Observability with Loki
projects.description: Centralized logging and dashboards with Loki and Prometheus to improve platform visibility and incident response.
